ogTitle: Cundare vs Curdies River: Climate Safety

heading: Cundare vs Curdies River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cundare, Victoria and Curdies River, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Curdies River has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Cundare (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cundare or Curdies River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cundare has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Curdies River scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cundare scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Curdies River scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cundare or Curdies River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Curdies River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
